Acceptance Criteria: Merchant can save and validate storeId and integration profile
Intent API returns checkout URL and transaction can complete end-to-end
Callback is acknowledged quickly and event is persisted durably
State transitions follow canonical rules and duplicate callbacks are idempotent
Merchant can view status timeline and failed reasons
Drifted transactions are detected and listed with action status
MA initiation and status inquiry pass staging test suite
OTC initiation and inquiry pass staging test suite
Request and response signatures validate against defined vectors
Generate QR workflow returns QR payload and records transaction
Precheck token flow works with required request headers and validations
Admin can control channel access and config approvals
Security-sensitive actions are exported with actor and timestamp
Failed callback/inquiry retries follow policy and DLQ replay works
Latency and error-rate alerts trigger and runbook remediation is documented
